abilities.name: Bringer of Bad News
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is dealt damage, it may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 1. If it does so, reduce the damage dealt by 2.

abilities.name: Manic Interview
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, an enemy model within 2" gains an Entranced token.

actions.name: Crazed Swipe
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action deals +1 damage if the target has an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Slander
triggers.text: Increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

actions.name: Flash Photography
actions.effects: Target gains an Entranced token. If this action receives a raise, increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

triggers.name: Shifting Photograph
triggers.text: Reveal the top three cards of the target's fate deck. For each (c) revealed this way, move the target up to 2". Then, discard all non-(c) cards revealed this way and place the rest back in the same order.

actions.name: Chasing Ghosts
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or this model may move them up to 2".

triggers.name: Rattle to Reason
triggers.text: An ally within range may remove a token.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw two cards and then discard one card.
